parityMeta.describes: iOS-17e-1 per-exercise e1RM parity — progressive-overload history. Five completed push-a bench-press sessions log a strictly rising top weight (60→62.5→65→67.5→70 kg, reps 6, default rir 2, acceptable technique), spaced 3 days. The REAL e1rmEngine yields buildE1RMProfile.current via the median_recent path (>=3 high-quality recent candidates) and a high-confidence best (low intra-recent spread). Pins the rising-trend current+best+high-confidence branch of the per-exercise estimate. FUNCTION-LEVEL compute-assert on the Swift side (E1RMEngine re-runs the ported functions on the echoed engineInput.history).
parityMeta.sourceNotes: Synthetic history built via makeSession (push-a / bench-press). Five sessions daysAgo 14/11/8/5/2, two sets each at the same rising top weight. e1rm per set = roundToHalfKg(epley(w,6)); median of the recent five => stable current; low spread => high best.
